benefits.description: Reported reduction in scar tissue (estimated 30-50% in initial report, though later attributed primarily to fasting), reduced hamstring numbness upon waking
Able to walk with almost no discomfort after 3-week follow-up

side_effects.description: Tears and pain on right leg (hamstring and quad) after rapid scar tissue loss, initially thought to be destabilization from too-rapid recovery on less-damaged side

protocol_notes: Stack combined with green tea fasting (3-9 days), red light therapy, and electrolyte supplementation (sodium, potassium, magnesium). Local subcutaneous injection to hamstrings and quads (375 mcg total per injection). Initial protocol: 2x daily, 3 days on/3 days off. Later reduced to: 50-100 mcg localized daily at night, 1 day on/3 days off. User later concluded fasting alone was more effective than peptides for muscle recovery and stated they would not repurchase peptides for this indication.
